title: Report
doc_html:
§599.20. Report

            An authority shall report annually on the activities of the authority to the local government where the authority is located.

            Acts 2025, No. 443, §1.
doc_text:
§599.20. Report
An authority shall report annually on the activities of the authority to the local
government where the authority is located.
Acts 2025, No. 443, §1.
